role.value: Wood frame structure, MDF cladding for flat and curved surfaces, finish-ready detailing, electrical/lighting coordination, and onsite installation support.

details.body: The Sanctuary scope covered end-to-end technical delivery from wood frame structure through final-ready substrate preparation. Work included MDF panel coverage/cladding on both flat and curved surfaces, with tight geometry control to achieve clean reveals and joints ready for finishing. Field coordination ensured lighting and electrical readiness at all interface points before close-up, and onsite install support was provided to keep sequencing, fit-up, and quality aligned with project milestones.

items: Wood frame structure execution for the primary built forms
MDF panel coverage/cladding across flat and curved surfaces
Finish-ready surfaces with clean reveals and precise joints
Coordination for lighting and electrical readiness before closure
Onsite install support for sequencing, fit-up, and quality control
